title: Cross-page consistency and final regression
releaseGate: Publish only after batch-001 and batch-002 are both complete and evidence has been reviewed.

stories.title: Run cross-page workbench consistency pass
stories.scope: Compare all nine business pages and make only bounded consistency fixes so headers, list density, action placement, and supporting detail regions align with the confirmed workbench language.
stories.nonGoals: Do not reopen page-specific redesign scope beyond consistency-level fixes.
acceptance: All nine business pages share a recognizable workbench rhythm.
Any baseline-page adjustments stay narrow and documented.

stories.title: Capture final browser and build verification for the rollout
stories.scope: Run final browser verification across the business pages, capture rollout evidence, and confirm `pnpm build` in `apps/aidc-web` after the consistency pass.
stories.nonGoals: Do not add new UI scope after verification except for tiny blocker-level fixes.
acceptance: Browser evidence exists for the redesigned pages and consistency pass.
Build succeeds after the final FE pass.
Known backend blockers are explicitly recorded if they affect verification.
notes: Record any remaining backend runtime blocker instead of masking it.
